item.description: Adam Schefter @AdamSchefter · 21min The Dexter Lawrence trade: Bengals, Giants and NFL draft takeaways, via @billbarnwell : espn.com Four big takeaways from the Dexter Lawrence trade: Barnwell sizes up the Bengals' shocking move The Giants traded Lawrence to the Bengals for the No. 10 pick in the draft. What does that say about the NFL's trade market, this draft class and the state of the Bengals? 65 32 302 173 mil

item.title: RichCimini: Rich Cimini @RichCimini · 44min Jets draft preview: Mini-scouting report on a player who could be under consideration at
item.description:
Rich Cimini @RichCimini · 44min Jets draft preview: Mini-scouting report on a player who could be under consideration at 16:
Omar Cooper, Jr., WR, Indiana (6-0, 199)
Fernando Mendoza’s most-targeted receiver: 91 targets, 69 catches, 937 yards, 13 TDs, 3 drops last season. Most of his work came out of the Mostrar más 11 3 37 7 mil

item.title: robpizzola: Rob Pizzola @robpizzola · 1h I have two bettors I really respect telling me completely different things about the #2 pic
item.description: Rob Pizzola @robpizzola · 1h I have two bettors I really respect telling me completely different things about the #2 pick. One is loading up on David Bailey to the Jets. The other is loading up on Arvell Reese to the Jets. Someone is going to have a very bad night on Thursday. 17 2 31 7 mil

Rich Cimini @RichCimini · 1h The annual Leggy 100 (via @Jeff_Legwold ). A must-read for dreftniks. His No. 1 prospect: Arvell Reese, a “rare player with elite versatility.” #nfldraft De espn.com 1 4 19 13 mil
